question: List all players drafted in the first round of 2018 along with their current team.
gold: SELECT d.player_name, c.team_name FROM draft_history d JOIN common_player_info c ON CAST(d.person_id AS TEXT) = c.person_id WHERE d.season = '2018' AND d.round_number = '1';
pred: SELECT draft_type FROM draft_history ORDER BY draft_type DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which teams had a home win rate above 70% in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, SUM(CASE WHEN wl_home = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS win_rate FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home HAVING win_rate > 0.7;
pred: SELECT team_id_home FROM other_stats GROUP BY team_id_home ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find active players who were the number one overall pick in the draft.

question: How many regular season games did the Celtics win against the Lakers since 2010?

question: Find teams whose average home points in the 2022-23 regular season exceeded their own average home points in the 2021-22 season.
gold: SELECT a.team_name_home FROM (SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home) a JOIN (SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS avg_pts FROM game WHERE season_id = '22021' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home) b ON a.team_name_home = b.team_name_home WHERE a.avg_pts > b.avg_pts;

question: Which top 5 draft picks between 2015 and 2020 are no longer active?

question: Which teams were the most inconsistent in home scoring during the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home FROM (SELECT team_name_home, AVG((pts_home - avg_ph) * (pts_home - avg_ph)) AS var_sum, COUNT(*) AS n FROM (SELECT team_name_home, pts_home, AVG(pts_home) OVER (PARTITION BY team_name_home) AS avg_ph FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season') x GROUP BY team_name_home) y WHERE (var_sum / n) > 4 ORDER BY var_sum / n DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Which team had the biggest gap between their highest and lowest home scores in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, MAX(pts_home) - MIN(pts_home) AS spread FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY spread DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T1.team_id_home FROM T1.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home FROM T2.team_id_home AS T1 JOIN T2.team_id_home AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.team_id_home

question: How many games did Jayson Tatum miss?
gold: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.game_id) FROM inactive_players i WHERE i.first_name = 'Jayson' AND i.last_name = 'Tatum';
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game_info

question: List 5 different opponents the Lakers faced at home in the 2022-23 regular season.
gold: SELECT DISTINCT matchup_home FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND team_name_home = 'Los Angeles Lakers' AND matchup_home LIKE '%vs.%' LIMIT 5;
pred: SELECT T2.team_id_home FROM other_stats AS T1 JOIN team_id_away AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.team_abbreviation_home = "Lakers" AND T2.team_id_home = "Lakers"

question: How many second-round picks after the 50th overall selection were there in the 2016 NBA Draft?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM draft_history WHERE season = '2016' AND round_number = '2' AND CAST(overall_pick AS INTEGER) > 50;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM draft_history WHERE overall_pick = 50

question: Which 10 players missed the most games during the 2022-23 season?
gold: SELECT first_name, last_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM inactive_players WHERE game_id LIKE '00222%' GROUP BY first_name, last_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
pred: SELECT T2.player_id FROM inactive_players AS T1 JOIN inactive_players AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.game_id WHERE T2.team_city = "2022-23"

question: Which 3 teams had the best home winning percentage in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home, SUM(CASE WHEN wl_home = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS home_win_rate FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home ORDER BY home_win_rate DESC LIMIT 3;
pred: SELECT T2.team_id_home FROM other_stats AS T1 JOIN team_stats AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home GROUP BY T2.team_id_home

question: Which referee has officiated the most NBA games?
gold: SELECT first_name, last_name, COUNT(*) AS appearances FROM officials GROUP BY first_name, last_name ORDER BY appearances DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT T2.official_id FROM officials AS T1 JOIN officials AS T2 ON T1.game_id = T2.official_id WHERE T2.first_name = "NBA" AND T2.last_name = "NBA"

question: How many 2022-23 regular season games had an attendance above 19,000?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game g JOIN game_info gi ON g.game_id = gi.game_id WHERE g.season_id = '22022' AND g.season_type = 'Regular Season' AND gi.attendance IS NOT NULL AND CAST(gi.attendance AS INTEGER) > 19000;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game_info WHERE attendance > 19.000

question: What was the average number of turnovers by the home team per game in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT AVG(CAST(o.team_turnovers_home AS REAL)) FROM game g JOIN other_stats o ON g.game_id = o.game_id WHERE g.season_id = '22022' AND g.season_type = 'Regular Season';
pred: SELECT avg(t1.turnovers_home) FROM other_stats AS t1 JOIN 2022-23 AS t2 ON t1.team_id_home = t2.team_id_home WHERE t2.team_turnovers_home = t2.team_turnovers_home

question: How many scoring plays occurred in the highest-scoring 2022-23 regular season game?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM play_by_play WHERE game_id = (SELECT game_id FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' ORDER BY pts_home + pts_away DESC LIMIT 1) AND eventmsgtype = 1;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many franchise name changes have occurred in NBA history?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_history;
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM franchise_history

question: In which years did the NBA Draft Combine have fewer than 50 participants?
gold: SELECT season FROM draft_combine_stats GROUP BY season HAVING COUNT(*) < 50 ORDER BY season DESC LIMIT 10;
pred: SELECT T2.team_city FROM draft_history AS T1 JOIN draft_history AS T2 ON T1.team_id = T2.team_id WHERE T2.team_city = 50

question: How many home games did the Chicago Bulls play in the 2022 season?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_summary gs JOIN team t ON gs.home_team_id = t.id JOIN game g ON gs.game_id = g.game_id WHERE gs.season = '2022' AND t.full_name = 'Chicago Bulls';
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM team_history WHERE year_founded = 2022

question: How many different teams played in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT team_name_home AS name FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' UNION SELECT team_name_away AS name FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season');
pred: SELECT count(DISTINCT team_id) FROM team_history WHERE year_founded = 2022-23

question: What were the dates of the Boston Celtics' first 5 home games in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT game_date FROM (SELECT game_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY game_date) AS rn FROM game WHERE team_name_home = 'Boston Celtics' AND season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season') x WHERE rn <= 5 ORDER BY game_date;
pred: SELECT T2.game_date_est FROM game_summary AS T1 JOIN game_summary AS T2 ON T1.game_date_est = T2.game_date_est WHERE T2.home_team_id = "Boston Celtics" AND T2.home_team_id = "Boston Celtics"

question: How many times in the 2022-23 regular season did the home team win while scoring at least 115 points and holding the opponent under 100?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND wl_home = 'W' AND pts_home >= 115 AND pts_away < 100;
pred: SELECT T2.team_id_home FROM other_stats AS T1 JOIN team_stats AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home GROUP BY T2.team_id_home ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What was the highest vertical leap by a forward at the 2019 NBA Draft Combine?
gold: SELECT MAX(max_vertical_leap) FROM draft_combine_stats WHERE season = '2019' AND position LIKE '%F%';
pred: SELECT max_vertical_leap FROM draft_combine_stats WHERE season = 2019

question: What was the highest regulation-time home score across all quarters in any 2022-23 regular season game?
gold: SELECT ls.game_id, (ls.pts_qtr1_home + ls.pts_qtr2_home + ls.pts_qtr3_home + ls.pts_qtr4_home) AS reg_home_pts FROM line_score ls JOIN game g ON ls.game_id = g.game_id WHERE g.season_id = '22022' AND g.season_type = 'Regular Season' ORDER BY reg_home_pts DESC LIMIT 1;
pred: SELECT t1.team_id_home FROM line_score AS t1 JOIN 2022-23 AS t2 ON t1.team_id_home = t2.team_id_home

question: Which team had the median average home points per game in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT team_name_home FROM (SELECT team_name_home, AVG(pts_home) AS av, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AVG(pts_home)) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS c FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' GROUP BY team_name_home) z WHERE rn = (c + 1) / 2;
pred: SELECT T1.team_id_home FROM other_stats AS T1 JOIN team_stats AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home GROUP BY T2.team_id_home

question: How many road games did the Lakers win in the 2022-23 regular season?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE season_id = '22022' AND season_type = 'Regular Season' AND team_name_away = 'Los Angeles Lakers' AND wl_away = 'W';
pred: SELECT count(*) FROM game_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: Were there any days in the 2022-23 regular season where the same team played two home games on the same date?
gold: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game a JOIN game b ON a.game_date = b.game_date AND a.team_name_home = b.team_name_home AND a.game_id < b.game_id WHERE a.season_id = '22022' AND a.season_type = 'Regular Season' AND b.season_id = '22022' AND b.season_type = 'Regular Season';
pred: SELECT T2.team_id_home FROM game AS T1 JOIN season_type AS T2 ON T1.team_id_home = T2.team_id_home WHERE T2.game_date = 2022-23
